ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with embedded image. All fields legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Scanned/image-based PDF. Text extracted but appears to be from OCR. All fields legible.

document_pairing.method: Content analysis — certificate file contains both certificate (page 1) and an embedded invoice (page 2). The separate invoice file (Document B, page 1) is a DIFFERENT invoice. Pairing per rule 8.5.0: certificate from certificate file page 1, invoice for verification from invoice file (Document B, page 1).

criteria_met: Consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' can be identified in invoice file (Document B) as issuer 'Th. Brunius & Co AB'
criteria_not_met: Certificate does not reference invoice number 501885 (the invoice in Document B). Certificate goods description references PO 1027/22 but invoice in Document B has ORDER NO 40554.

Consignee in certificate is 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton, Riyadh, Saudi Arabia' but invoice in Document B is sold to 'Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing, Khartoum, Sudan'
sanity_check.motivation: The certificate references PO 1027/22 and consignee Al-Medan in Saudi Arabia. The invoice in the invoice file (Document B) is invoice 501885 with ORDER NO 40554, sold to Chinese Tri-River Factory in Sudan. These are entirely different transactions. The embedded invoice in the certificate file (Document A, page 2) is invoice 501896 which matches the certificate's PO 1027/22 and consignee Al-Medan — but per rule 8.5.0, the verification must be against the SEPARATE invoice file. The certificate's consignor (Th.Brunius & Co AB) matches the invoice issuer, satisfying one criterion, but the consignee and all references are mismatched. Per rule 8.6, since only 1 of 3 criteria is met (consignor only), and the consignee and references clearly indicate a completely different transaction, the pairing is invalid.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate.

consignor.certificate_value: Th.Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17, Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Th. Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden (VAT NO: SE556011055201)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in invoice file
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' found as invoice issuer 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' in header and signature block of Document B. Difference is only a space after 'Th.' which is minor formatting.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice: Sweden (explicit in address). Also confirmed by VAT prefix SE.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name found in invoice header/issuer block
Country verified via explicit address and VAT prefix SE

consignor.debug_explanation: Consignor 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' from certificate matches 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' in the invoice issuer block. The only difference is a space character after 'Th.' which is a minor formatting variation. Country Sweden is confirmed by the explicit address 'SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden' and VAT number prefix SE. MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.2.1. However, this match is on the consignor/issuer identity only — the fundamental problem is that this invoice is for a completely different transaction (different buyer, different goods, different quantities).
consignor.motivation: Consignor name and country verified. 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' matches 'Th. Brunius & Co AB' (minor space formatting). Country Sweden confirmed via address and VAT prefix.

consignee.certificate_value: Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton, P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value: SOLD TO: Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing, No. 3036, Block 35, Gebra Industrial Area, Khartoum, Sudan; CONSIGNED TO: Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing, No. 3036, Block 35, Gebra Industrial Area, Khartoum, Sudan

comparison_steps.description: Identify SOLD TO as primary consignee field
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice SOLD TO field: 'Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing'. CONSIGNED TO field: same party. No 'Al-Medan' found anywhere.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name to invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton'. Invoice: 'Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing'. These are completely different company names. No match possible.
Certificate: Saudi Arabia. Invoice: Sudan. Different countries.

comparison_steps.description: Search for Al-Medan anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: 'Al-Medan' does not appear anywhere in the invoice file (Document B).

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification — SOLD TO is primary
Company name verification — completely different names
Country check — Saudi Arabia vs Sudan
MISMATCH — consignee not identifiable in invoice

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton' in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The invoice (Document B) is sold to and consigned to 'Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing' in Khartoum, Sudan. These are entirely different companies in different countries. The name 'Al-Medan' does not appear anywhere in the invoice file. This is a clear MISMATCH on both name and country. No normalization or exception rule can bridge this gap — these are different legal entities in different countries.
consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton' i Riyadh, Saudi Arabia kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan anger 'Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing' i Khartoum, Sudan som både SOLD TO och CONSIGNED TO. Helt olika företag i olika länder.

goods_description.certificate_value: 82 reels of White Top Testliner, H.S. Code No.: 48052400
goods_description.invoice_value: 4 Reels: WHITE (Subs 135gsm), 5 Reels: BROWN (Subs 135gsm), 15 Reels: BROWN (Subs 125gsm), 15 Reels: ROYAL 2000 (Subs 125gsm). Total 39 Reels.

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain specific article numbers. HS code 48052400 is a tariff code, not an article number.

Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'White Top Testliner'. Invoice descriptions: 'WHITE', 'BROWN', 'ROYAL 2000'. The term 'White Top Testliner' or 'Testliner' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The invoice uses only abbreviated product names (WHITE, BROWN, ROYAL 2000). These cannot be matched without semantic interpretation. Additionally, certificate states 82 reels vs invoice total of 39 reels — entirely different quantities of entirely different products.

comparison_steps.description: Check if invoice uses abbreviations for certificate's full product name
comparison_steps.detail: The invoice descriptions (WHITE, BROWN, ROYAL 2000) are different product types, not abbreviations of 'White Top Testliner'. WHITE alone is not the same as 'White Top Testliner' — it's a different grade. BROWN and ROYAL 2000 are entirely different product types.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'White Top Testliner' cannot be identified in invoice
MISMATCH — goods description cannot be verified

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate describes '82 reels of White Top Testliner' with HS code 48052400. The invoice (Document B) describes completely different products: WHITE (4 reels), BROWN (20 reels), ROYAL 2000 (15 reels) — totaling 39 reels. The identity-bearing main designation 'White Top Testliner' does not appear in the invoice. The products are clearly different (different grades, different quantities, different total reels). This is a clear MISMATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning '82 reels of White Top Testliner' kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan beskriver helt andra produkter: WHITE, BROWN, ROYAL 2000 — totalt 39 rullar. Termen 'White Top Testliner' förekommer inte i fakturan.

quantity.invoice_value: Total Weight Quantity: 69.658 MT, Total Unit Count: 39 Reels

comparison_steps.description: Check if 247.133 can be found in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: The value 247.133 does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Invoice total weight is 69.658 MT — a completely different value.

comparison_steps.description: Check if invoice explicitly contradicts certificate quantity
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 247.133 MT. Invoice: 69.658 MT. Both are total weights in MT. The difference is 177.475 MT (254.9% of invoice value), far exceeding the ±0.1% tolerance. This is an explicit contradiction.

rules_applied.description: Numeric value 247.133 not found in invoice
Explicit contradiction — invoice total weight 69.658 MT vs certificate 247.133 MT
MISMATCH — value not identifiable and contradicted

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate quantity is 247.133 MT. Invoice total weight is 69.658 MT. These are completely different values — the certificate value is more than 3.5 times the invoice value. The value 247.133 does not appear anywhere in the invoice. This is an unambiguous MISMATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets mängd 247.133 MT kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans totalvikt är 69.658 MT — ett helt annat värde.

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field explicitly states 'Sweden'.
Certificate: Slovakia. Invoice: Sweden. These are different countries. No normalization rule can equate Slovakia and Sweden.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate states Country of Origin: Slovakia. Invoice states COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: Sweden. These are two different countries. No normalization or EU-equivalence rule applies (Slovakia and Sweden are both EU members, but the certificate specifically names Slovakia, not EU, and the invoice specifically names Sweden, not EU). The certificate does not claim EU origin — it claims Slovak origin specifically. Per rule 4.5.5, this is a MISMATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Slovakia' överensstämmer inte med fakturans 'Sweden'. Olika länder anges.

Total Weight Quantity: 69.658 MT, Total Unit Count: 39 Reels

rule_evaluation_log.result: Certificate from Document A page 1. Invoice for verification from Document B page 1. Document A page 2 contains an embedded invoice (501896) which is NOT used for verification per 8.5.0.

FAIL — Only consignor matches. Consignee completely different (Al-Medan vs Chinese Tri-River), country different (Saudi Arabia vs Sudan), all references different. This is clearly a wrong invoice paired with this certificate.
Not applicable — no LC reference found
MATCH — Th.Brunius & Co AB found as invoice issuer

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority order — SOLD TO field
rule_evaluation_log.result: MISMATCH — completely different company and country

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.result: MISMATCH — 'White Top Testliner' not found in invoice
MISMATCH — 247.133 not found, invoice shows 69.658 MT

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The embedded invoice in the certificate file (Document A, page 2 — invoice 501896) could be used for verification
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 8.5.0, verification must be against the SEPARATE invoice file (Document B), not against embedded invoices in the certificate file. The embedded invoice is supplementary material belonging to the certificate document.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The consignee names could be matched via normalization
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton' and 'Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing' are completely different legal entities. No normalization rule can equate these names.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Slovakia and Sweden could be equivalent via EU normalization
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: EU normalization (4.5.4.1/4.5.4.2) allows EU ↔ member state equivalence. However, the certificate specifically names 'Slovakia' (not EU), and the invoice specifically names 'Sweden' (not EU). These are two different specific country names. EU normalization does not make two specific EU member states interchangeable with each other.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Fel faktura har bifogats till certifikatet. Certifikatet avser en leverans av 82 rullar White Top Testliner (247,133 MT) till Al-Medan Project Company i Riyadh, Saudiarabien med ursprung i Slovakien. Den bifogade fakturan (501885) avser en helt annan leverans av 39 rullar diverse pappersprodukter (69,658 MT) till Chinese Tri-River Factory i Khartoum, Sudan med ursprung i Sverige. Mottagare, varor, kvantitet och ursprungsland överensstämmer inte.
blocking_issues: Consignee MISMATCH: Certificate 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton, Saudi Arabia' vs Invoice 'Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing, Sudan'
Goods description MISMATCH: Certificate 'White Top Testliner' vs Invoice 'WHITE, BROWN, ROYAL 2000'
Quantity MISMATCH: Certificate 247.133 MT vs Invoice 69.658 MT
Country of origin MISMATCH: Certificate 'Slovakia' vs Invoice 'Sweden'

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport — Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Th.Brunius & Co AB, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17, Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Th. Brunius & Co AB, VAT NO: SE556011055201, PO Box 2516, SE-403 17 Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Consignor-namn identifierat som fakturans utställare. Mindre formateringsskillnad (mellanslag efter 'Th.'). Land verifierat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Th.Brunius & Co AB' kan identifieras i fakturans utställarblock som 'Th. Brunius & Co AB'. Skillnaden är enbart ett mellanslag. Land Sverige bekräftat via adress och VAT-nummer med SE-prefix.

sections.certificate_value: Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton, P.O.Box 51, 11351 Riyadh, Saudi Arabia
sections.invoice_value: SOLD TO: Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing, No. 3036, Block 35, Gebra Industrial Area, Khartoum, Sudan
sections.rule_applied: Certifikatets mottagare kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Helt olika företagsnamn och olika länder.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Al-Medan Project Company For Corrugated Carton' i Riyadh, Saudiarabien kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan anger 'Chinese Tri-River Factory for Carton Industrialization & Packing' i Khartoum, Sudan. Helt olika juridiska parter i helt olika länder. MISMATCH på både namn och land.

sections.certificate_value: 82 reels of White Top Testliner, H.S. Code No.: 48052400
sections.invoice_value: 4 Reels: WHITE, 5 Reels: BROWN, 15 Reels: BROWN, 15 Reels: ROYAL 2000 — Total 39 Reels
sections.rule_applied: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'White Top Testliner' kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan beskriver helt andra produkter.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger '82 reels of White Top Testliner'. Fakturan innehåller produkterna WHITE, BROWN och ROYAL 2000 — totalt 39 rullar. Termen 'White Top Testliner' eller 'Testliner' förekommer inte i fakturan. Produkterna är uppenbart helt olika.

sections.invoice_value: Total Weight Quantity: 69.658 MT, Total Unit Count: 39 Reels
sections.rule_applied: Certifikatets värde 247.133 MT kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans totalvikt 69.658 MT motsäger certifikatets uppgift.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 247.133 MT förekommer inte i fakturan. Fakturans totalvikt är 69.658 MT — en avvikelse på över 250%. Uttrycklig motsägelse mellan certifikat och faktura.

sections.rule_applied: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Slovakia' överensstämmer inte med fakturans 'Sweden'.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'Slovakia'. Fakturan anger COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: 'Sweden'. Olika länder. Ingen normaliseringsregel kan likställa Slovakien med Sverige.

output_quality_checks.notes: 4 checkpoints MISMATCH → comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. Consistent. This is clearly a wrong invoice paired with the certificate — the embedded invoice in the certificate file (page 2) matches the certificate, but the separate invoice file contains a completely different transaction.
